title: Mexico steps in to host Iran’s World Cup team after US refusal
full_text:
Mexico steps in to host Iran’s World Cup team after US refusal
Mexico steps in to host Iran’s World Cup team after US refusal
Mexico says it has agreed to host Iran’s World Cup team after the US declined to allow the squad to stay, with President Claudia Sheinbaum saying Mexico saw ‘no reason to refuse’ FIFA’s request.
Published On 25 May 2026
